metadata.description: Jaedyn's personal Claude Code plugins and skills

plugins.name: engram
plugins.description: Use Obsidian as Claude's long-term knowledge graph and memory system. Stores projects, decisions, knowledge, people, and session history as interconnected notes with wikilinks and tags.

plugins.name: caldera-mcp
plugins.description: Domain skills for Ignition SCADA development via Caldera MCP. Workflow-specific guidance for gateway exploration, Perspective view debugging, Jython scripting, feature planning, and safe write operations.
